recommendations.title: Housefull 3
recommendations.overview: A father doesn't want his three daughters to get married. Now, it's up to three men to try to and convince the father that they're a good fit for his daughters.

recommendations.title: Father and Daughter
recommendations.overview: A father says goodbye to his young daughter. In time the daughter grows old, but within her there is always a deep longing for her father.

recommendations.title: Just Retired
recommendations.overview: Marilou and Philippe prepare for their future retirement in Portugal. But their daughter separates and a whole procession of solicitations falls on them.

recommendations.title: Podium
recommendations.overview: Bernand Fréderic is a mediocre bank executive. He's married and has a son. He used to have another profession: being French star Claude Francois. Now, with the Imitators Gala Night coming up, he must choose between his wife or the only thing that mak

recommendations.title: Robot & Frank
recommendations.overview: Curmudgeonly old Frank lives by himself. His routine involves daily visits to his local library, where he has a twinkle in his eye for the librarian. His grown children are concerned about their father’s well-being and buy him a caretaker robot. Init

recommendations.title: How to Deal
recommendations.overview: For teenager Halley, love seems like an alien concept. Her mother is divorcing her father, who is dating a younger woman Halley can't stand. Her sister is about to get married and doesn't realize that her fiancé is not the man of her dreams. And her

recommendations.title: All Together
recommendations.overview: Five old friends decide to move in together as an alternative to living in a retirement home. Joining them is an ethnology student whose thesis is on the aging population.

recommendations.title: Jenny's Wedding
recommendations.overview: Jenny Farrell is getting married. But how will her straight-laced family react when they find out that the woman they thought was their daughter’s roommate is actually her fiancée? As the old-fashioned Farrells attempt to come to terms with the prosp

recommendations.title: Main Street
recommendations.overview: A small town in Spain, October 1955. Isabel, a 35-year-old dreamer who feels like a failure because she is not married yet, becomes the new target of a group of soulless pranksters.

recommendations.title: Black Swan
